use tonic::{transport::Server, Request, Response, Status};
use log::{info, error};
use std::sync::Arc;

pub mod fusion_proto {
    tonic::include_proto!("fusion_core_v2");
}

use fusion_proto::runtime_server::{Runtime, RuntimeServer};
use fusion_proto::{HealthCheckRequest, HealthCheckResponse, PluginRequest, PluginResponse};

mod engine; // Import the engine module
use engine::WasmEngine;

pub struct FusionCoreService {
    wasm_engine: Arc<WasmEngine>,
}

impl FusionCoreService {
    pub fn new() -> Self {
        let engine = WasmEngine::new().expect("Failed to initialize WASM engine");
        Self {
            wasm_engine: Arc::new(engine),
        }
    }
}

#[tonic::async_trait]
impl Runtime for FusionCoreService {
    async fn health_check(
        &self,
        request: Request<HealthCheckRequest>,
    ) -> Result<Response<HealthCheckResponse>, Status> {
        info!("HealthCheck from client: {}", request.get_ref().client_id);
        Ok(Response::new(HealthCheckResponse {
            status: "OPERATIONAL".into(),
            version: "2.0.0-Nebula".into(),
            load_index: 0.12,
        }))
    }

    async fn execute_plugin(
        &self,
        request: Request<PluginRequest>,
    ) -> Result<Response<PluginResponse>, Status> {
        let req = request.get_ref();
        info!("Executing Plugin: {}", req.plugin_name);

        let engine = self.wasm_engine.clone();
        let wasm_data = req.wasm_binary.clone();
        let input = req.input_data.clone();

        // Offload CPU intensive WASM task to blocking thread
        let result = tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || {
            engine.execute(&wasm_data, &input)
        }).await.map_err(|e| Status::internal(format!("Thread join error: {}", e)))?;

        match result {
            Ok((code, out, time)) => {
                Ok(Response::new(PluginResponse {
                    exit_code: code,
                    output_data: out,
                    error_message: "".into(),
                    execution_time_ms: time,
                }))
            }
            Err(e) => {
                error!("Plugin execution failed: {}", e);
                Ok(Response::new(PluginResponse {
                    exit_code: -1,
                    output_data: "".into(),
                    error_message: e.to_string(),
                    execution_time_ms: 0.0,
                }))
            }
        }
    }
}

#[tokio::main]
async fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    env_logger::init();
    let addr = "0.0.0.0:50051".parse()?;
    let service = FusionCoreService::new();

    info!("Fusion Runtime Core v2.0 (Nebula) listening on {}", addr);

    Server::builder()
        .add_service(RuntimeServer::new(service))
        .serve(addr)
        .await?;

    Ok(())
}
